name: Cauliflower Oriental Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cauliflower florets in a covered pot and add an inch of water. Bring to a simmer.
2. Add the sliced Shitake mushrooms after a few minutes, adding more water if needed.
3. Add the sliced water chestnuts.
4. In a separate pan, mix together 2 tablespoons cornstarch, 2 tablespoons soy sauce, 2 tablespoons sherry, and 2 tablespoons chicken stock or water.
5. Stir until the mixture thickens slightly.
6. Remove from heat and pour the sauce over the cauliflower and vegetables on a platter.
7. Sprinkle with chopped scallions.
8. Serve immediately. (Serves 3 to 4) (0mg Chol., 0gm saturated fat)
